case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION QUALIFIED; TO MOTION BY RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY TO SET ASIDE THE SUMMARY JUGGMENT, DISCHARGEA FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL;

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,111.00, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $10111, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL; NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL IS GRANTED - SUMMARY JUDGMENT VACATED ON GROUNDS THAT THE COURT FAILED TO FORFEIT THE BAIL IN OPEN COURT ON OCT. 19, 2001 AS REQUIRED BY PENAL CODE 1305(A). HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

calendar.matters:
MOTION To Set Aside The Summary Judgment Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Aug-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion to Set Aside Summary Judgment Discharge Forfeiture and Exonerate Bail is granted - summary judgment vacated on grounds that the Court failed to forfeit the bail in open court on Oct. 19, 2001 as required by Penal Code 1305(a). (JJM/md) ERIC L. THRONE, CSR #7855 (301)
